description: Composition:These shoes are made of pure leatherCare: Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyFit:RegularGeneral:leather shoes have long been known to be the essential formal footwear. However, the current trend lists leather shoes, be it black, tan, brown or fawn, as the most versatile piece of footwear. They can also be combined with ultra-slim fit jeans and a jazzy party shirt, with gelled hair and minimal accessories so that the focus remains on the style and not the accessories. These are fairly simple black formal shoes, with quite a bit of detailing towards the toes. Tall men are recommended to wear these shoes with ultra slim trousers so that your shoes are accentuated in a sophisticated way.
